columns.extraction_plan: In Table 2, under "Primary outcomes in the overall population", locate the row "Overall survival". For the column "SOC with abiraterone groups" under "Median, years", the value is "5·7". Convert this to months: 5.7 years * 12 months/year = 68.4 months.

In Table 2, under "Primary outcomes in the overall population", locate the row "Overall survival". For the column "SOC without abiraterone groups" under "Median, years", the value is "4·7". Convert this to months: 4.7 years * 12 months/year = 56.4 months.

Table 2 (Chunk 3, page 9) provides "Overall survival in patients with high-volume metastatic burden" but explicitly states this is under "Secondary outcomes in the ADT with docetaxel population", not the overall population. Chunk 5 (page 7) also discusses high metastatic burden survival (5.14 years for treatment) but specifies this is "In the ADT with docetaxel population".

Table 2 (Chunk 3, page 9) provides "Overall survival in patients with high-volume metastatic burden" but explicitly states this is under "Secondary outcomes in the ADT with docetaxel population", not the overall population. Chunk 5 (page 7) also discusses high metastatic burden survival (3.47 years for control) but specifies this is "In the ADT with docetaxel population".

Table 2 (Chunk 3, page 9) provides "Overall survival in patients with low-volume metastatic burden" but explicitly states this is under "Secondary outcomes in the ADT with docetaxel population", not the overall population. Chunk 5 (page 7) states that "no conclusive response in overall survival could be shown for patients with low metastatic burden" for the ADT with docetaxel population, and no data is provided for the overall population.
